label: 网格→场景节点
description: 由 2D grid 构造一个携带体素的独立场景节点，输出单节点 scene（focus 指向新节点）。grid[y][x] 非零 → (x,y,z) 体素，z 取自 zRange 列表（每个非零格对应 zRange 中所有 z 层）。多个 grid2node 输出可通过 add_child 挂到同一父节点下。
description-en: Construct a single scene node from a 2D grid. Non-zero cells in grid[y][x] become voxels at (x,y,z) for each z in zRange (one voxel per layer per cell). Compose outputs under a parent via add_child.

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: grid
inputs.description: 输入二维 grid（grid[y][x]）；非零值写入对应 (x,y,zBase) 体素
inputs.description-en: Input 2D grid (grid[y][x]); non-zero cells become voxels at (x,y,zBase).

inputs.name: schema
inputs.label: schema
inputs.description: 节点几何 schema 标签
inputs.description-en: Schema tag for the node geometry.

inputs.name: zRange
inputs.label: z 层
inputs.description: 体素 z 坐标列表；每个非零格在列表中每一层各生成一个体素。默认 [0] 表示单层平铺。
inputs.description-en: List of z values; each non-zero cell emits one voxel per z in this list. Default [0] = single flat layer.

outputs.name: scene
outputs.label: scene
outputs.description: 单节点 scene，focus 指向新节点；可直接喂下游 add_child / set_transform / node_explode
outputs.description-en: One-node scene with focus on the new node; feed into add_child / set_transform / node_explode.
